name: Puppetman: Ragdoll Puzzle
author: Poki
description: Puppetman: Ragdoll Puzzle is a puzzle game where your goal is to safely lower a ragdoll character to the ground. Use your strategic thinking to solve puzzles and control platforms to guide the character down, trying to minimize any damage. Unlock various cute hats to customize your character. If you enjoy a particular challenge, feel free to replay it, or skip it if it becomes too difficult. Can you safely lower the ragdoll to the floor with minimal harm? How to play Puppetman: Ragdoll Puzzle? Click A/S/D button or press A/S/D keys on your keyboards. Who created Puppetman: Ragdoll Puzzle? Puppetman: Ragdoll Puzzle is created by Gepnito Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Puppetman: Ragdoll Puzzle for free? You can play Puppetman: Ragdoll Puzzle for free on Poki. Can I play Puppetman: Ragdoll Puzzle on mobile devices and desktop? Puppetman: Ragdoll Puzzle can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
